title: Growing powder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Growing_powder-Ewoks_11.jpg|250px|thumb|Wicket and Teebo using growing powder]]
'''Growing powder''' was a substance used by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] to increase the size of shrunken Ewoks. It proved particularly useful when [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] was abducted by the [[Fleebog]]s, enabling her and her rescuers [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]] to return to their normal sizes.

Kneesaa also used the powder to make the [[ra-lugg]] larger, eliminating it as a threat to the [[Fleebog]]s.

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' (1985) 11]] {{1st}}
